understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the single `+` goal gem tile on each level before running out of turns (50) or attempts (2).
understanding.mechanics_understanding: MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT shifts the player horizontally one step, after which gravity instantly pulls them along that column until they land on a solid tile, hit a spike, or reach the goal. CLICK removes a breakable block at the given coordinates. Spikes (`u`/`v`) instantly end the run. Gravity direction (DOWN or UP) reverses which way gravity pulls after each move. UNDO reverts the last action. The moving-platform counter decrements only on MOVE actions.

understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the single `+` goal gem tile on each level before running out of turns (50) or attempts (2).
understanding.mechanics_understanding: MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT shifts the player horizontally one step, after which gravity instantly pulls them along that column until they land on a solid tile, hit a spike, or reach the goal. CLICK removes a breakable block at the given coordinates. Spikes (`u`/`v`) instantly end the run. Gravity direction (DOWN or UP) reverses which way gravity pulls after each move. UNDO reverts the last action. The moving-platform counter decrements only on MOVE actions.
